      enumerate the possible goal selections, starting with the best one

      returns true iff the selected node is a goal

      selects the first open goal below the given node old if no open goal is available node old is selected.

    • Method Detail

      • setProof

        public void setProof(Proof p)
        Does not take care of GUI effects

      • setSelectedProof

        public void setSelectedProof(Proof p)
        sets the selected proof
        Parameters:
        p - the Proof that is selected

      • getSelectedProof

        public Proof getSelectedProof()
        returns the proof that is selected by the user
        Returns:
        the proof that is selected by the user

      • setSelectedNode

        public void setSelectedNode(Node n)
        sets the node that is focused by the user
        Parameters:
        n - the selected node

      • setSelectedGoal

        public void setSelectedGoal(Goal g)
        sets the node that is focused by the user
        Parameters:
        g - the Goal that contains the selected node

      • getSelectedNode

        public Node getSelectedNode()
        returns the node that is selected by the user
        Returns:
        the node that is selected by the user

      • getSelectedGoal

        public Goal getSelectedGoal()
        returns the goal the selected node belongs to, null if it is an inner node
        Returns:
        the goal the selected node belongs to, null if it is an inner node

      • isGoal

        public boolean isGoal()
        returns true iff the selected node is a goal
        Returns:
        true iff the selected node is a goal

      • defaultSelection

        public void defaultSelection()
        selects the first goal in the goal list of proof if available if not it selects a leaf of the proof tree

      • nearestOpenGoalSelection

        public void nearestOpenGoalSelection(Node old)
        selects the first open goal below the given node old if no open goal is available node old is selected. In case that old has been removed from the proof the proof root is selected
        Parameters:
        old - the Node to start looking for open goals

      • getFirstOpenGoalBelow

        private Goal getFirstOpenGoalBelow(Node n)
        retrieves the first open goal below the given node, i.e. the goal containing the first leaf of the subtree starting at n which is not already closed
        Parameters:
        n - the Node where to start from
        Returns:
        the goal containing the first leaf of the subtree starting at n, which is not already closed. null is returned if no such goal exists.

      • addKeYSelectionListener

        public void addKeYSelectionListener(KeYSelectionListener listener)

      • removeKeYSelectionListener

        public void removeKeYSelectionListener(KeYSelectionListener listener)

      • fireSelectedNodeChanged

        public void fireSelectedNodeChanged()

      • fireSelectedProofChanged

        public void fireSelectedProofChanged()
